ActionKind.description: The mutating tool executed for a ledger entry.

Actor.description: Originator of an action: the batch triage agent, the chat agent, or the human.

editedBody.description: Optional edited reply body to send instead of the agent draft on approve.

allOf.description: Unique id of a pending approval request.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the approval was requested.

payload.description: Proposed tool arguments (e.g. the draft reply body).

summary.description: What the agent proposes to do if approved.

ApprovalVerdict.description: Human verdict on a pending sensitive action.

Category.description: Email category. The last four (financial, dispute, safety, escalation) are always sensitive.

conversationId.description: Existing conversation to continue, or omit to start a new one.

allOf.description: The user prompt to send to the chat agent.

ChatStreamEvent.description: Discriminated event emitted over the chat SSE stream.

Confidence.description: Model confidence in the decision, between 0 and 1 inclusive.

isSensitive.description: Whether the policy classifies this email as sensitive (never auto-actioned).

keyFacts.description: Extracted salient facts the reviewer should see (amounts, dates, parties).

rationale.description: Full plain-language explanation of the decision, rendered as markdown.

inReplyTo.description: Id of the email this one replies to, or null when it starts a thread.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the email was received.

actions.description: Ledger entries recorded for this email, newest first.

decision.description: The agent verdict, or null if this email has not been triaged yet.

pendingApproval.description: A sensitive action awaiting approval, or null when none is pending.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the action was recorded.

payload.description: Tool arguments captured at execution time (e.g. draft body).

summary.description: Human-readable one-line description of what happened.

undoes.description: For an undo action, the id of the entry it reverses; otherwise null.

undoneBy.description: Id of the ledger entry that undid this action, or null if still in effect.

allOf.description: Unique id of an action-ledger entry.

Severity.description: Urgency of the email, from low to critical.

fresh.description: When true, clear all prior decisions, actions, and triage conversations, then re-triage every email.

isSensitive.description: Whether the policy classifies this email as sensitive (never auto-actioned).

keyFacts.description: Extracted salient facts the reviewer should see (amounts, dates, parties).

rationale.description: Full plain-language explanation of the decision, rendered as markdown.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the action was recorded.

payload.description: Tool arguments captured at execution time (e.g. draft body).

summary.description: Human-readable one-line description of what happened.

undoes.description: For an undo action, the id of the entry it reverses; otherwise null.

undoneBy.description: Id of the ledger entry that undid this action, or null if still in effect.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the approval was requested.

payload.description: Proposed tool arguments (e.g. the draft reply body).

summary.description: What the agent proposes to do if approved.

TriageStreamEvent.description: Discriminated event emitted over the triage-run SSE stream.

WhyPreview.description: At-a-glance rationale for the list row, at most 65 characters.

info.description: Effect v4 backend contract for the Agentic Inbox app.
info.title: Agentic Inbox API

post.description: Reverse an auto-executed action; appends an undo entry to the ledger and returns it.
Approve or deny a paused sensitive action, resuming the agent and recording the outcome in the ledger.
Send a message and stream text deltas, reasoning, and tool-call events as Server-Sent Events.

get.description: Check if the backend is running.
Return the summary roll-up and every email joined with its decision, status, pending approval, and actions.
Return every recorded action, newest first, for the agent-trace timeline.

post.description: Clear one email's decision, active ledger entries, and triage conversation, re-run the agent on just that email, and return the refreshed inbox.

Process the inbox and stream per-email events (started, decision, action, approval_pending, failed, done) as Server-Sent Events. Pass fresh=true to clear all prior triage state and re-process every email.
